request.prompt:
Use case: social ad
Primary request: Investor/influencer-style ad concept for a macOS photo workflow app focused on saving time from the very beginning of importing and selection.
Scene/background: Stylized desktop workflow environment and clean app UI mock scenes; no real people.
Subject: A fictional photo workflow app interface showing mounted source browsing, rapid keep/reject tagging, queue-based export flow, and destination templating.
Action: beat 1 (0-2s) chaotic multi-window workflow collapses into one clean workflow UI; beat 2 (2-5s) mounted source appears and browsing begins instantly; beat 3 (5-8s) multi-select keep/reject and undo/redo; beat 4 (8-10s) keepers auto-queue for export; beat 5 (10-12s) preset export with folder template and completion state.
Camera: mostly locked-off UI framing with one slow push-in and one vertical pan for queue progress.
Lighting/mood: premium, focused, high-clarity product demo tone.
Color palette: graphite, slate, electric cyan accents, warm white.
Style/format: polished SaaS product ad, crisp UI readability, clean motion graphics.
Timing/beats: 12-second clip with clear sequential beats and minimal overlap.
Audio: light modern ambient bed, no vocals.
Text (verbatim): "Invest your focus at the start, and every step after gets faster.", "Win the first minutes, cut rework, and unlock higher productivity.", "Build your signature workflow with Darkroom."
Constraints: all content suitable for all audiences; no copyrighted characters; no copyrighted music; no real people; no logos other than plain app name text; keep text legible.
Avoid: flicker, jitter, illegible text, fast motion blur, cluttered overlays.
